In contrast to our CD45+-sorted scRNA-seq dataset, DC-sorted scRNA-seq analysis identified three distinct WAT DC populations: conventional type 1 DCs (cDC1s) defined by expression of IRF8, DPP4, CADM1 and XCR1, coventional type 2 DCs subset A (cDC2As), via expression of CD1C, IRF4, IL7R and LAMP3, and conventional type 2 DCs subset B (cDC2Bs) by increased expression of CD1C, IRF4, FCER1A and CLEC10A, consistent with the phenotypes of DC subsets recently reported in human blood34 (Fig. 4f, Extended Data Fig. 6b,c and Supplementary Table 4).
